texto: We do not realize how deeply our starting assumptions affect the way we go about looking for and interpreting the data we collect. We should recognize that nonhuman organisms need not meet every new definition of human language, tool use, mind, or consciousness in order to have versions of their own that are worthy of serious study. We have set ourselves too much apart, grasping for definitions that will distinguish man from all other life on the planet. We must rejoin the great stream of life from whence we arose and strive to see within it the seeds of all we are and all we may become.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sue Savage-Rumbaugh sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “We do not realize how deeply our starting assumptions affect the way we go about looking for and …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, assumptions, consciousness, útil em momentos de estudos e consciousness.

texto: I'm in the role of helping these apes negotiate the human role. I'm just a temporary intermediary in what I think will be eventual communication between the two species.
explicacao: Citação de Sue Savage-Rumbaugh sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I'm in the role of helping these apes negotiate the human role. I'm just a temporary intermediary…” articula reflexao, think, human em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como human e two.
